name: Ukuhlelwa Kokopha (Udidi I-IV)
description: Ukuhlelwa kwe-ATLS ye-hemorrhage ngokuqikelelwa kokulahleka kwegazi kunye nokuphendula komzimba.
instructions: Qikelela ilahleko yegazi kwaye utshatise iimpawu zomzimba eklasini. Ukungxamiseka konyango kuyanda kunye neklasi.

scoring.treatment: Ulwelo lwe-IV + iimveliso zegazi, ukulawula ukopha kwangoko
Ukulawula ukopha ngokukhawuleza kotyando -- kubeka ubomi esichengeni

pediatric.note: Abantwana bahlawula ixesha elide ngaphambi kokuba bahlawule. Udidi lwe-III / IV lunokuthi lubonise nge-BP esondeleyo-eqhelekileyo kude kube nokuwa ngokukhawuleza. Thembela i-tachycardia kunye nesimo sengqondo phezu kweBP.

obstetric.note: Izigulane ezikhulelweyo zine-40-50% yokwandisa umthamo wegazi. Inokunyamezela ilahleko enkulu ngaphambi kokubonisa iimpawu. Uxinzelelo lwe-fetal lunokwandulela iimpawu zomama.
